eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Olmsted, MN; at 07:47 AM ON MAR 11, 2026 Effective until 08:47 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a test. Rochester Emergency Management is conducting a weekly test of the Emergency Alert System. If this was a real emergency, additional details and instructions would follow. This is only a test.
